name: ATCo2
short_description: ATCo2 is a casual/serious game for aviation fans that want to learn more about sustainability impacts of aviation. Play as an ATC, control your planes on different locations around the world, and keep an eye on your total CO2 emissions.
detailed_description:
ATCo2 is a casual/serious game for aviation fans that want to learn more about sustainability impacts of aviation.

You play an air traffic controller on different locations around the world.
Your goal is to direct all planes to their target airports without any unnecessary detours.
To get to the next level, you always have to keep an eye on the total CO2 emissions.

Additionally you will get a lot of interesting information about the sustainability impacts of aviation.

Key Features:

  • 20 different levels/maps
  • get started immediately without the need for any instructions
  • simple graphics, simple gameplay
  • play and learn at the same time!
  • simple wind system that puts your planes off course
  • traffic waves that generate more planes for a short time
  • 30 Steam achievements
  • really cool background music
  • available on Windows, Linux and Mac
